Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The FAA’s flight restriction for drones is an attempt to criminalize filming ICE 78 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Go on Embedded Systems and WebAssembly 123 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. DCJ11Hack+ – DEC PDP/11 based homebrew computer 18 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. A Taxonomy of Interiors 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Fake Fans 51 upvotes, 6 comments
  6. Show HN: I built a frontpage for personal blogs 641 upvotes, 168 comments
  7. Build your own Dial-up ISP with a Raspberry Pi 105 upvotes, 22 comments
  8. Show HN: TinyOS – A minimalist RTOS for Cortex-M written in C 63 upvotes, 12 comments
  9. iNaturalist 321 upvotes, 93 comments
  10. What changes when you turn a Linux box into a router 93 upvotes, 23 comments
  11. Herbie: Automatically improve imprecise floating point formulas 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Artemis II crew take “spectacular” image of Earth 465 upvotes, 189 comments
  13. April 2026 TLDR Setup for Ollama and Gemma 4 26B on a Mac mini 293 upvotes, 114 comments
  14. The house is a work of art: Frank Lloyd Wright 30 upvotes, 7 comments
  15. We replaced RAG with a virtual filesystem for our AI documentation assistant 213 upvotes, 96 comments
  16. Iran strikes leave Amazon availability zones "hard down" in Bahrain and Dubai 127 upvotes, 58 comments
  17. Oracle Files H-1B Visa Petitions Amid Mass Layoffs 355 upvotes, 198 comments
  18. Bourbon waste could provide next-gen supercapacitor components 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  19. Async Python Is Secretly Deterministic 62 upvotes, 27 comments
  20. How to Make a Sliding, Self-Locking, and Predator-Proof Chicken Coop Door (2020) 68 upvotes, 35 comments
  21. OpenClaw privilege escalation vulnerability 233 upvotes, 152 comments
  22. Run Linux containers on Android, no root required 14 upvotes, 4 comments
  23. How to Write Unmaintainable Code (1999) 14 upvotes, 6 comments
  24. Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw 186 upvotes, 173 comments
  25. Age verification on Systemd and Flatpak 65 upvotes, 62 comments
  26. Extra usage credit for Claude to celebrate usage bundles launch (Pro, Max, Team) 23 upvotes, 22 comments
  27. F-15E jet shot down over Iran 357 upvotes, 824 comments
  28. Show HN: Mtproto.zig – High-performance Telegram proxy with DPI evasion 6 upvotes, 6 comments
  29. Why are we still using Markdown? 48 upvotes, 109 comments
  30. Charge Robotics (YC S21) Is Hiring Software and Hardware Engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 9:00am, 4 April 2026. Source here.
